name: SIPHRKTUP
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[SIPHRKTUP] ON [dbo].[SIPARISHAREKETLERI]
FOR UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SB_REF AS INT
DECLARE @SD_REF AS INT

DECLARE SIPHRKTUPDcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT D.SB_REF from DELETED D,INSERTED I WHERE I.SD_REF=D.SD_REF AND (D.MIKTAR<>I.MIKTAR OR D.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR<>I.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR OR D.KAPALI<>I.KAPALI)
OPEN SIPHRKTUPDcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM SIPHRKTUPDcur 
INTO @SB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR>0 AND KAPALI=0)>0
		UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET KAPALI=0 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET KAPALI=1 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

FETCH NEXT FROM SIPHRKTUPDcur
INTO @SB_REF;
END  
CLOSE SIPHRKTUPDcur;  
DEALLOCATE SIPHRKTUPDcur;
